Founder message

A Message From the Founder

Most people do not need another boring class. They need a goal, a teacher who keeps them accountable, and a place where confidence is built step by step.

Music should be played, shared, and experienced in the real world.
You do not need confidence on day one. OTS builds that with you.
If you commit to practice, OTS commits to preparing you for performance.

FAQ

Questions Before You Join?

Is this course only for guitar?

Yes. This application is for the OTS guitar crash course only.

Do I need guitar experience?

No. The course is beginner-friendly and also works for people restarting after a break.

What happens after I apply?

The OTS team will contact you on WhatsApp or call you, then schedule an interview before selection.

Will I be selected immediately?

No. You apply first, then selection happens after an interview with the team.

Can I call the team directly?

Yes. You can call or WhatsApp the OTS leads team at +91 80560 92675.

What if I am shy to perform?

That is normal. The course is designed to build confidence gradually through practice and support.
